about_fund.description: Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by Quant Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 14 Apr 1996. Sanjeev Sharma is the Current Fund Manager of Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹88 Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by Quant Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 14 Apr 1996. Sanjeev Sharma is the Current Fund Manager of Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹88,796 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 25 Mar 2026 is ₹85.42. The Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹1,000. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹5,000. Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 15 days. ...Read more
about_fund.investment_objective: The scheme seeks to provide capital appreciation by investing in a focused portfolio of Large cap -'bluechip' companies

faqs.question: How to Invest in Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth?
faqs.answer: You can easily invest in Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth in a hassle-free manner on Groww. The process is extremely simple, quick and completely paperless. Invest in a few minutes with the following steps:Log on to your Groww accountSearch for Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth from the search boxIn order to invest, you will have to complete all the KYC formalities which are completely online and paperless and take a few minutes to completeOnce you are done with that, you can start investing in Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth as SIP or lumpsum as per your investment objective and risk tolerance

faqs.question: What kind of returns does Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth provide?
faqs.answer: The Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth has been there from 07 Jan 2013 and the average annual returns provided by this fund is -2.72% since its inception.

faqs.question: How much expense ratio is charged by Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth?
faqs.answer: The termExpense Ratioused for Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth or any other mutual fund is the annual charges one needs to pay to the Mutual Fund company for managing your investments in that fund.The Expense Ratio of Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth is 0.86% as of 27 Mar 2026...

faqs.question: What is the AUM of Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth?
faqs.answer: The AUM, short forAssets Under Managementof Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth is ₹826.63Cr as of 27 Mar 2026.

faqs.question: How to Redeem Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth?
faqs.answer: If you want to sell your Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth holdings, go to your holding on the app or web and simply click on it. You will get two options - redeem & invest more; click on redeem and enter your desired amount or if you wish to redeem the entire holding amount then select the 'redeem all' checkbox.

faqs.question: Can I invest in SIP and Lump Sum of Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth?
faqs.answer: You can select eitherSIPorLumpsuminvestment of Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth based on your investment objective and risk tolerance.

faqs.question: What is the NAV of Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth?
faqs.answer: The NAV of Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth is ₹85.42 as of 25 Mar 2026.

faqs.question: What is the PE and PB ratio of Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth?
faqs.answer: ThePE ratioratio of Quant Focused Fund Direct Growth is determined by dividing the market price by its earnings per share and thePB ratioof the same is evaluated by dividing the stock price per share by its book value per share (BVPS).
